claim_text: The local inventory covers 584 raw series across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
sample: Files currently present under data_local/raw plus config/feature_registry.yml.
method: Filesystem inventory, feature-registry parse, and processed-panel coverage audit.
uncertainty: License status is release-risk classification, not legal permission.
evidence_grade: A for local inventory; B for release-risk classification.
limitation: Provider files remain local and untracked.
finding: The local inventory covers 584 raw series across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
estimate_summary: The local inventory covers 584 raw series across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
uncertainty_summary: License status is release-risk classification, not legal permission.
sample_summary: Files currently present under data_local/raw plus config/feature_registry.yml.
sensitivity_summary: Filesystem inventory, feature-registry parse, and processed-panel coverage audit.
interpretation: The local inventory covers 584 raw series across 8 provider groups and 31 registered features.
alternative_explanation: Provider files remain local and untracked.

claim_text: Every registered or discovered processed feature receives one usage status; 25 are marked primary_analysis.

method: Deterministic one-status taxonomy using coverage, registration, unit, timing, and measurement risk.
uncertainty: Automated status does not prove empirical strength.
finding: Every registered or discovered processed feature receives one usage status; 25 are marked primary_analysis.
estimate_summary: Every registered or discovered processed feature receives one usage status; 25 are marked primary_analysis.
uncertainty_summary: Automated status does not prove empirical strength.

sensitivity_summary: Deterministic one-status taxonomy using coverage, registration, unit, timing, and measurement risk.
interpretation: Every registered or discovered processed feature receives one usage status; 25 are marked primary_analysis.

claim_text: Selected-major crypto returns share a strong common factor on the matched current-cohort daily panel.
method: Matched-window correlation, lower-tail co-exceedance, and PCA diagnostics.
uncertainty: Reported in source tables where applicable; otherwise descriptive and coverage-bound.
limitation: Current-cohort daily data is survivorship-biased and does not establish historical altseason behavior.
finding: Selected-major crypto returns share a strong common factor on the matched current-cohort daily panel.
estimate_summary: Selected-major crypto returns share a strong common factor on the matched current-cohort daily panel.
uncertainty_summary: Reported in source tables where applicable; otherwise descriptive and coverage-bound.
sensitivity_summary: Matched-window correlation, lower-tail co-exceedance, and PCA diagnostics.
interpretation: Selected-major crypto returns share a strong common factor on the matched current-cohort daily panel.
alternative_explanation: Current-cohort daily data is survivorship-biased and does not establish historical altseason behavior.

claim_text: Later-sample equity co-movement is higher in the synchronized BTC/ETH exposure tables.
method: HAC OLS, same-support block R2 deletion, rolling beta, FDR, VIF, and ridge sensitivity.
uncertainty: Reported in source tables where applicable; otherwise descriptive and coverage-bound.
limitation: Period splits are descriptive and do not identify ETF effects.
finding: Later-sample equity co-movement is higher in the synchronized BTC/ETH exposure tables.

uncertainty_summary: Reported in source tables where applicable; otherwise descriptive and coverage-bound.

interpretation: Later-sample equity co-movement is higher in the synchronized BTC/ETH exposure tables.
alternative_explanation: Period splits are descriptive and do not identify ETF effects.

claim_text: Lagged leverage/funding/OI states are associated with volatility and tail-stress diagnostics.

claim_text: ETF flow-return associations are reported as lag-response market-plumbing diagnostics with separate BTC and ETH source starts.
